data.title: Bitcoin & Ether Climb to 3-Week Highs on Friday Afternoon Rally
data.description:

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s UnitedHealth stake still trailing even as stock rips higher
data.description:
Berkshire Hathaway may be sitting on a loss even as UnitedHealth shares push higher. The healthcare giant’s stock has jumped nearly 30% since Warren Buffett’s firm disclosed in mid-August that it bought just over 5 million shares between April 1 and June 30. According to CNBC, that SEC filing hit right after the stock closed […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/berkshires-unitedhealth-stake-still-trailing/

data.title: Tesla and Micron are rallying into overbought zones with S&P at all-time high
data.description:
Tesla and Micron are running hot as the S&P 500 locks in another record, ending the week at 6,600. 21. The index rose 1. 6% this week. […]

data.title: ‘Outrageous!’ ‘Shocking!’ ‘Insane!’ – Video Reveals Skyrocketing Prices at Grocery Stores Across the US
data.description:
A new video mashup is exposing the skyrocketing cost of living in cities across the US. The video from the YouTube channel ModernDayChaos shows dozens of people who are sharing their struggles buying groceries, labeling soaring prices as “outrageous,” “shocking” and “insane.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/13/outrageous-shocking-insane-video-reveals-skyrocketing-prices-at-grocery-stores-across-the-us/

data.title: Main Street still feels like a recession even as Wall Street breaks records
data.description:
Wall Street just wrapped a record-smashing week. Stocks are riding high, and corporate earnings are beating expectations. Every company tied to anything remotely related to AI is swimming in cash. Analysts are hiking price targets almost every other day. Interest rates, while still high, are easing. But if you talk to anyone on Main Street, […]

data.title: LBank has listed XDOG, OKI, EXO, and XRATS
data.description: According to official news, LBank will launch trading of XDOG (XDOG) and Oki Token (OKI) at 6:20 PM (UTC) on September 13, 2025; Exotic Markets (EXO) at 6:50 PM; and XRATS (XRATS) at 7:10 PM. Trading pairs will be available for XDOG/USDT, OKI/USDT, EXO/USDT, and XRATS/USDT. Deposits are currently open, with withdrawals for XDOG and OKI opening at 6:00 PM (UTC) on September 14, and EXO and XRATS at 7:00 PM (UTC) on September 14.
